The following events took place in '''36 [[Galactic Standard Calendar|ABY]]'''.

==Events==
*The [[Swarm War]] [[Battle of the Murgo Choke|began]] and [[Battle of Tenupe|ended]].
*The [[Killik/Legends|Killiks]] were defeated and [[Exile (punishment)/Legends|exiled]] back into the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]] and the [[Gorog|Dark Nest]] was destroyed.
*The [[Dark Jedi/Legends|Dark Jedi]] of the Dark Nest were [[Death/Legends|killed]] or defeated, thus leaving only [[Lumiya's Sith]] as the last surviving remnant of the [[Order of the Sith Lords]].
*[[Luke Skywalker/Legends|Luke Skywalker]] witnessed a [[Hologram/Legends|hologram]], kept by [[R2-D2/Legends|R2-D2]], of his [[Anakin Skywalker/Legends|father]] leading the [[Operation: Knightfall/Legends|slaughter]] at the [[Jedi Temple/Legends|Jedi Temple]], as well as another one in which Vader was [[Telekinesis/Legends|Force-choking]] Luke's [[Padmé Amidala/Legends|mother]] and her giving birth to him and [[Leia Organa Solo/Legends|his sister]].
*[[Conclave on Ossus]]; Luke Skywalker officially claimed the title of [[Grand Master/Legends|Grand Master]] of the [[New Jedi Order|Jedi Order]].
